pi_items.source: Confirmed by exact matching strings in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py checking for the text report.
Confirmed by analyzing export_result.sh which queries the Firefox Places database specifically for URLs containing 'check.torproject.org'. Python script verified it's a real live website.
Confirmed by analyzing export_result.sh which specifically checks for a bookmark title matching 'Tor A11y Target' in the moz_bookmarks table.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real public internet page 'https://check.torproject.org/' and expects the agent to create a bookmark titled 'Tor A11y Target'. The final output text file must be saved precisely at '/home/ga/Documents/a11y_audit.txt', as verified by the evaluation scripts.
